caption: Just me, Maya, soaking up the spring sun in a crisp white linen dress and nothing else on my mind but this golden hour glow. It’s that kind of freedom where the breeze feels like a secret whisper against your skin, and I can’t help but let my hair fall freely while sipping iced wine in a quiet, sun-drenched corner of Tuscany. 🍷🌞 #SpringVibes #TravelDiaries #GoldenHourLove
